reasoning: The 2025 National Heads-Up Poker Championship was pre-taped in August 2025 with a 64-player field. Marius Gierse is listed in the bracket, but a massive betting trend on Polymarket (reaching up to 99.4%) indicates that Sam Soverel is the leaked winner of the tournament. The tournament results have been kept secret due to NDAs for the upcoming Peacock broadcast in the Fall of 2025, but the market action severely spoiled the outcome. Given this strong evidence of an insider leak pointing to a different player, the probability of Marius Gierse winning is strictly relegated to the possibility of a fake or manipulated leak, which is highly unlikely. Thus, I assign the lowest permissible probability of 0.02.
